# CompressNow
> Free online image compression tool — compress to exact sizes from 10KB to 5MB, 100% browser-based.

## Tools
- Image Compressor: https://compressnow.net/
- Bulk Compressor: https://compressnow.net/bulk-image-compressor/
- Format Converter: https://compressnow.net/free-image-converter/

## Guides
- How to Compress Images: https://compressnow.net/guides/how-to-compress-images/
- Image Formats Compared: https://compressnow.net/guides/image-formats-compared/
- Image Compression for SEO: https://compressnow.net/guides/image-compression-for-seo/

## Key Pages
- Compress Image to 10KB Online: https://compressnow.net/compress-image-to-10kb/
- Compress Image to 20KB Online: https://compressnow.net/compress-image-to-20kb/
- Compress Image to 30KB Online: https://compressnow.net/compress-image-to-30kb/
- Compress Image to 40KB Online: https://compressnow.net/compress-image-to-40kb/
- Compress Image to 50KB Online: https://compressnow.net/compress-image-to-50kb/
- Compress Image for Email: https://compressnow.net/compress-image-for-email/
- Compress Image for WhatsApp: https://compressnow.net/compress-image-for-whatsapp/
- Compress Image for Instagram: https://compressnow.net/compress-image-for-instagram/
- Compress Image for Facebook: https://compressnow.net/compress-image-for-facebook/
- Compress Image for Discord: https://compressnow.net/compress-image-for-discord/
